title: jacquemontia cearensis
intro: Jacquemontia cearensis, also known as Brazilian morning glory or Cearense morning glory, is a type of flowering vine native to Brazil. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Jacquemontia cearensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
